days.summary: Zhipu AI introduced GLM-5 as its new flagship base model for agent engineering, positioning it as an open-source contender with strong reported results on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0. OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 Cyber was independently evaluated by the UK AI Security Institute and is being rolled out first to critical cyber defenders, signaling tighter controlled deployment of frontier offensive-security capability. NVIDIA highlighted SGLang running DeepSeek-V4 at 180 tok/s/GPU with roughly 1 million-token context on Blackwell, a notable inference efficiency milestone for long-context open models.
